name: Sweet and Spicy Vegetable Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
2. In a large skillet over medium heat, sauté chopped vegetables (e.g., bell peppers, zucchini, onions) in olive oil until tender.
3. Add minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
4. Stir in tomato paste, soy sauce, honey, vinegar, and spices like chili flakes or red pepper flakes to taste.
5. Cook the pasta mixture together with the vegetables until heated through.
6. Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the skillet.
7. Mix well to combine all ingredients evenly.
8. Turn off the heat and serve immediately.
